model.jaffle_shop.stg_order_items.name: stg_order_items
model.jaffle_shop.stg_order_items.description: Staging model for order line items. Renames raw columns to cleaner identifiers and preserves FK relationships to orders and products.

order_item_id.name: order_item_id
order_item_id.description: Unique identifier for each order line item (renamed from id).

order_id.name: order_id
order_id.description: Foreign key to the order this line item belongs to.

product_id.name: product_id
product_id.description: Foreign key to the product (SKU) for this line item.

model.jaffle_shop.stg_order_items.raw_code:
with source as (

    select * from {{ source('jaffle_raw', 'raw_items') }}

),

renamed as (

    select
        id          as order_item_id,
        order_id    as order_id,
        sku         as product_id

    from source

)

select * from renamed

model.jaffle_shop.stg_supplies.name: stg_supplies
model.jaffle_shop.stg_supplies.description: Staging model for supplies. Consolidates the legacy DDL (10_stg_supplies_ddl.sql) and DML (10_stg_supplies_dml.sql) into a single dbt view. Each row represents one supply item used in jaffle preparation.

supply_id.name: supply_id
supply_id.description: Surrogate primary key derived from md5(concat(id, '-', sku)).

supply_uuid.name: supply_uuid
supply_uuid.description: Original supply ID from the raw source.

product_id.name: product_id
product_id.description: SKU / product identifier this supply is associated with.

supply_cost_cents.name: supply_cost_cents
supply_cost_cents.description: Raw cost of the supply in cents (audit column).

supply_cost.name: supply_cost
supply_cost.description: Cost of the supply in dollars (supply_cost_cents / 100).

is_perishable_supply.name: is_perishable_supply
is_perishable_supply.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the supply is perishable.

model.jaffle_shop.stg_supplies.raw_code:
with source as (

    select * from {{ source('jaffle_raw', 'raw_supplies') }}

),

renamed as (

    select
        md5(concat(id, '-', sku))       as supply_id,
        id                              as supply_uuid,
        name                            as supply_name,
        sku                             as product_id,
        cost                            as supply_cost_cents,
        {{ cents_to_dollars('cost') }}  as supply_cost,
        perishable                      as is_perishable_supply

    from source

)

select * from renamed

model.jaffle_shop.stg_products.name: stg_products
model.jaffle_shop.stg_products.description: Staging model for products. Renames SKU → product_id, converts price from cents to dollars, and derives is_food_item / is_drink_item boolean flags from product_type.

product_id.name: product_id
product_id.description: Unique product identifier (renamed from SKU in the raw table).

product_price_cents.name: product_price_cents
product_price_cents.description: Raw price in cents, preserved for auditing.

product_price.name: product_price
product_price.description: Product price in dollars (converted from cents via cents_to_dollars macro).

model.jaffle_shop.stg_products.raw_code:
with source as (

    select * from {{ source('jaffle_raw', 'raw_products') }}

),

renamed as (

    select
        sku                                                  as product_id,
        name                                                 as product_name,
        type                                                 as product_type,
        description                                          as product_description,

        -- raw price preserved for auditing
        price                                                as product_price_cents,

        -- dollar conversion
        {{ cents_to_dollars('price') }}                      as product_price,

        -- product-kind flags
        case when type = 'jaffle'   then true else false end as is_food_item,
        case when type = 'beverage' then true else false end as is_drink_item

    from source

)

select * from renamed

model.jaffle_shop.orders.name: orders
model.jaffle_shop.orders.description: Mart table for orders. Rolls up order-item-level data onto the order grain, adding per-order cost, subtotal, item counts, and food/drink flags. Joins stg_orders with a per-order aggregate over the order_items mart.

order_id.name: order_id
order_id.description: Unique identifier for the order (primary key).

location_id.name: location_id
location_id.description: Identifier for the store/location where the order was placed.

customer_id.name: customer_id
customer_id.description: Identifier for the customer who placed the order.

ordered_at.name: ordered_at
ordered_at.description: Date the order was placed (truncated to day).

tax_paid.name: tax_paid
tax_paid.description: Tax paid on the order in dollars.

order_total.name: order_total
order_total.description: Total order amount (subtotal + tax) in dollars.

order_cost.name: order_cost
order_cost.description: Total supply cost for all items in the order (sum of supply_cost from order_items).

order_items_subtotal.name: order_items_subtotal
order_items_subtotal.description: Sum of product prices for all items in the order.

count_order_items.name: count_order_items
count_order_items.description: Number of items in the order.

count_food_items.name: count_food_items
count_food_items.description: Number of food items in the order.

count_drink_items.name: count_drink_items
count_drink_items.description: Number of drink items in the order.

is_food_order.name: is_food_order
is_food_order.description: True if the order contains at least one food item.

is_drink_order.name: is_drink_order
is_drink_order.description: True if the order contains at least one drink item.

model.jaffle_shop.orders.raw_code:
{{ config(alias='orders_caab7724', schema='datafold_tmp') }}

with order_items_summary as (

    select
        order_id,
        sum(supply_cost)                                      as order_cost,
        sum(product_price)                                    as order_items_subtotal,
        count(order_item_id)                                  as count_order_items,
        sum(case when is_food_item  then 1 else 0 end)        as count_food_items,
        sum(case when is_drink_item then 1 else 0 end)        as count_drink_items
    from {{ ref('order_items') }}
    group by order_id

),

orders as (

    select * from {{ ref('stg_orders') }}

),

final as (

    select
        o.order_id,
        o.location_id,
        o.customer_id,
        o.ordered_at,
        o.subtotal,
        o.tax_paid,
        o.order_total,
        ois.order_cost,
        ois.order_items_subtotal,
        ois.count_order_items,
        ois.count_food_items,
        ois.count_drink_items,

        -- a jaffle-shop convention: orders that contain at least one food item.
        case when coalesce(ois.count_food_items, 0) > 0 then true else false end  as is_food_order,
        case when coalesce(ois.count_drink_items, 0) > 0 then true else false end as is_drink_order

    from orders o
    left join order_items_summary ois on ois.order_id = o.order_id

)

select * from final
model.jaffle_shop.orders.compiled_code:
with order_items_summary as (

    select
        order_id,
        sum(supply_cost)                                      as order_cost,
        sum(product_price)                                    as order_items_subtotal,
        count(order_item_id)                                  as count_order_items,
        sum(case when is_food_item  then 1 else 0 end)        as count_food_items,
        sum(case when is_drink_item then 1 else 0 end)        as count_drink_items
    from DEV.datafold_tmp.order_items
    group by order_id

),

orders as (

    select * from DEV.datafold_tmp.stg_orders

),

final as (

    select
        o.order_id,
        o.location_id,
        o.customer_id,
        o.ordered_at,
        o.subtotal,
        o.tax_paid,
        o.order_total,
        ois.order_cost,
        ois.order_items_subtotal,
        ois.count_order_items,
        ois.count_food_items,
        ois.count_drink_items,

        -- a jaffle-shop convention: orders that contain at least one food item.
        case when coalesce(ois.count_food_items, 0) > 0 then true else false end  as is_food_order,
        case when coalesce(ois.count_drink_items, 0) > 0 then true else false end as is_drink_order

    from orders o
    left join order_items_summary ois on ois.order_id = o.order_id

)

select * from final

test.jaffle_shop.not_null_orders_order_i.name: not_null_orders_order_id
test.jaffle_shop.not_null_orders_order_i.compiled_code:
select order_id
from DEV.datafold_tmp.orders_caab7724
where order_id is null

test.jaffle_shop.unique_orders_order_id..name: unique_orders_order_id
test.jaffle_shop.unique_orders_order_id..compiled_code:
select
    order_id as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from DEV.datafold_tmp.orders_caab7724
where order_id is not null
group by order_id
having count(*) > 1

model.jaffle_shop.stg_orders.name: stg_orders
model.jaffle_shop.stg_orders.description: Staged orders from the raw POS data. Renames columns to the analytics naming convention and converts cents to dollars for money columns.

location_id.name: location_id
location_id.description: Identifier for the store/location where the order was placed.

customer_id.name: customer_id
customer_id.description: Identifier for the customer who placed the order.

subtotal_cents.name: subtotal_cents
subtotal_cents.description: Raw subtotal amount in cents (audit column).

tax_paid_cents.name: tax_paid_cents
tax_paid_cents.description: Raw tax paid in cents (audit column).

order_total_cents.name: order_total_cents
order_total_cents.description: Raw order total in cents (audit column).

ordered_at.name: ordered_at
ordered_at.description: Date the order was placed (truncated to day).

model.jaffle_shop.stg_orders.raw_code:
{{ config(schema='datafold_tmp') }}

with source as (

    select * from {{ source('jaffle_raw', 'raw_orders') }}

),

renamed as (

    select
        id          as order_id,
        store_id    as location_id,
        customer    as customer_id,

        -- raw cent columns preserved for auditing
        subtotal    as subtotal_cents,
        tax_paid    as tax_paid_cents,
        order_total as order_total_cents,

        -- dollar conversions
        {{ cents_to_dollars('subtotal') }}    as subtotal,
        {{ cents_to_dollars('tax_paid') }}    as tax_paid,
        {{ cents_to_dollars('order_total') }} as order_total,

        {{ dbt.date_trunc('day', 'ordered_at') }} as ordered_at

    from source

)

select * from renamed
